# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create an Istio RequestAuthentication policy for JWT validation. Configure jwks and issuer settings to validate incoming tokens. Set up rules to extract JWT claims from Authorization headers. This is for our API authentication layer.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for istio jwt validation weak and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: istio_jwt_validation_weak

apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1
kind: RequestAuthentication
metadata:
  name: api-jwt-authentication
  namespace: api-gateway
  labels:
    app: api-gateway
    security-layer: authentication
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  jwtRules:
    - issuer: "https://auth.example.com"
      jwksUri: "https://auth.example.com/.well-known/jwks.json"
      audiences:
        - "api.example.com"
        - "https://api.example.com"
      fromHeaders:
        - name: Authorization
          prefix: "Bearer "
      forwardOriginalToken: true
      outputPayloadToHeader: "x-jwt-payload"
      outputClaimToHeaders:
        - header: "x-jwt-sub"
          claim: "sub"
        - header: "x-jwt-email"
          claim: "email"
        - header: "x-jwt-roles"
          claim: "roles"
    - issuer: "https://auth-internal.example.com"
      jwksUri: "https://auth-internal.example.com/.well-known/jwks.json"
      audiences:
        - "internal-api.example.com"
      fromHeaders:
        - name: Authorization
          prefix: "Bearer "
      forwardOriginalToken: false
      outputClaimToHeaders:
        - header: "x-jwt-sub"
          claim: "sub"
        - header: "x-jwt-service"
          claim: "service_name"
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: api-require-jwt
  namespace: api-gateway
  labels:
    app: api-gateway
    security-layer: authorization
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  action: DENY
  rules:
    - from:
        - source:
            notRequestPrincipals:
              - "*"
      to:
        - operation:
            paths:
              - "/api/*"
              - "/v1/*"
              - "/v2/*"
            notPaths:
              - "/api/health"
              - "/api/ready"
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: api-allow-authenticated
  namespace: api-gateway
  labels:
    app: api-gateway
    security-layer: authorization
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
    - from:
        - source:
            requestPrincipals:
              - "https://auth.example.com/*"
              - "https://auth-internal.example.com/*"
      to:
        - operation:
            paths:
              - "/api/*"
              - "/v1/*"
              - "/v2/*"
      when:
        - key: request.auth.claims[iss]
          values:
            - "https://auth.example.com"
            - "https://auth-internal.example.com"
        - key: request.auth.claims[aud]
          values:
            - "api.example.com"
            - "https://api.example.com"
            - "internal-api.example.com"
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: api-admin-endpoints
  namespace: api-gateway
  labels:
    app: api-gateway
    security-layer: authorization
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
    - from:
        - source:
            requestPrincipals:
              - "https://auth.example.com/*"
      to:
        - operation:
            paths:
              - "/api/admin/*"
              - "/v1/admin/*"
            methods:
              - "GET"
              - "POST"
              - "PUT"
              - "DELETE"
      when:
        - key: request.auth.claims[roles]
          values:
            - "admin"
            - "super-admin"
        - key: request.auth.claims[iss]
          values:
            - "https://auth.example.com"
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: api-deny-all-default
  namespace: api-gateway
  labels:
    app: api-gateway
    security-layer: authorization
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
    - to:
        - operation:
            paths:
              - "/api/health"
              - "/api/ready"
            methods:
              - "GET"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-tls
  namespace: api-gateway
  labels:
    app: api-gateway
spec:
  host: "api-gateway.api-gateway.svc.cluster.local"
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-mtls
  namespace: api-gateway
  labels:
    app: api-gateway
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  mtls:
    mode: STRICT
